c74object.name: airfx.console8bussin~
c74object.digest: Console8BussIn moves to a channel/submix/buss topology and adds analog simulation.
c74object.description: Console8BussIn moves to a channel/submix/buss topology and adds analog simulation.

method.name: about
method.digest: Get the original Airwindows "about" text for this object
method.description: Prints the original Airwindows description for this plugin out the dump outlet.
